spec.name: A Cave Passageway
spec.description: You can head north and west through the cave passageways here, both ways dimly lit by the ever-present sconces on the walls. The echoes you heard earlier seem to be getting louder, and seem to be coming from the northern passage. You feeled a bit chilled from the cooled cave air and shiver a bit in the faint whisper of a breeze. This place is a little too eerie and dark to be comfortable in.
